Final Project: Sentiment Analysis of News related to AI

import requests
import pandas as pd
import time

key_words = ['artificial intelligence', 'AI', 'Grok', 'Gemini', 'Claude', 'ChatGPT', 'LLM', 'Large Language Models', 'Deep Learning', 'Neural Networks', 'OpenAI', 'Google AI', 'Anthropic', 'Microsoft AI', 'Meta AI', 'AI Ethics', 'AI Safety', 'AI Regulation']

my_api_key = '95e59d10b5bc447ba37b6fd6de9530eb'

news_data = []

for word in key_words:
    time.sleep(1)
    query = f'https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q={word}&language=en&sortBy=publishedAt&pageSize=100&apiKey={my_api_key}'
    re = requests.get(query)
    raw_json = re.json()
    articles = raw_json['articles']

    for article in articles:
        news_data.append([
            article['publishedAt'],
            word,
            article['source']['name'],
            article['title'],
            article['description']
        ])

news_df = pd.DataFrame(news_data, columns=['Date', 'Keyword', 'Source', 'Title', 'Description'])

news_df['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(news_df['Date'])
news_df = news_df.sort_values('Date')

news_df

import re

def clean_text(x):
    x = str(x).lower()
    x = re.sub(r'http\S+', '', x)
    x = re.sub(r'[^a-z\s]', '', x)
    x = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', x).strip()
    return x

news_df['text_clean'] = news_df['text'].apply(clean_text)

news_df[['text', 'text_clean']].head(10)

from textblob import TextBlob

news_df['polarity'] = news_df['text_clean'].apply(lambda x: TextBlob(x).sentiment.polarity)

news_df[['Keyword', 'polarity']].head(10)
Keyword polarity

1558 AI Ethics 0.032813 
from vaderSentiment.vaderSentiment import SentimentIntensityAnalyzer

vader = SentimentIntensityAnalyzer()

news_df['sentiment'] = news_df['text_clean'].apply(lambda x: vader.polarity_scores(x).get('compound'))

news_df[['Keyword', 'sentiment']].head(10)

import gensim
from gensim import corpora
def token_simple(x):
    return re.findall(r'[a-z]{2,}', str(x).lower())

tokens = news_df['text_clean'].apply(token_simple).tolist()

tokens[:2]
[['blackrock',
  'duped',
  'into',
  'loaning',
  'to',
  'telecom',
  'entrepreneur',
  'who',
  'allegedly',
  'faked',
  'invoices',
  'how',
  'to',
  'avoid',
  'similar',
  'scam',
  'an',
  'extraordinarily',
  'brazen',
  'and',
  'widespread',
  'fraud'],
 ['napariconvpaint',
  'plugin',
  'for',
  'segmentation',
  'by',
  'pixel',
  'classification',
  'using',
  'pretrained',
  'neural',
  'networks',
  'for',
  'feature',
  'extraction']]
id2word = corpora.Dictionary(tokens)

len(id2word)

corpus = [id2word.doc2bow(text) for text in tokens]

len(corpus)
1758
lda_model = gensim.models.ldamodel.LdaModel(
    corpus=corpus,
    id2word=id2word,
    num_topics=6,
    random_state=100,
    passes=10
)

for i in range(6):
    print("\nTopic {}:".format(i))
    print(lda_model.print_topic(i, topn=10))


topic_assign = []

for doc in corpus:
    dist = lda_model.get_document_topics(doc, minimum_probability=0.0)
    top_topic = max(dist, key=lambda x: x[1])[0]
    topic_assign.append(top_topic)

news_df['topic_id'] = topic_assign

news_df[['Keyword', 'topic_id']].head()

topic_summary = (news_df.groupby('topic_id').agg(avg_sent=('sentiment','mean'),
                 n_articles=('sentiment','size')).reset_index())

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure()
plt.hist(news_df["sentiment"], bins=20)
plt.title("Sentiment Distribution of AI News")
plt.xlabel("Compound Sentiment")
plt.ylabel("Count")
plt.show()
daily_sentiment = news_df.groupby('Date')['sentiment'].mean().reset_index()

#| label: daily-sentiment-line
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

plt.figure()
plt.plot(daily_sentiment['Date'], daily_sentiment['sentiment'])
plt.title('Average Daily Sentiment on AI News')
plt.xlabel('Date')
plt.ylabel('Average Sentiment')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
keyword_sentiment = news_df.groupby('Keyword')['sentiment'].mean().reset_index()

#| label: keyword-sentiment-bar
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

keyword_sentiment = news_df.groupby('Keyword', as_index=False)['sentiment'].mean()

plt.figure()
plt.bar(keyword_sentiment['Keyword'], keyword_sentiment['sentiment'])
plt.title('Average Sentiment by Keyword')
plt.xlabel('Keyword')
plt.ylabel('Average Sentiment')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Scatter
plt.figure()
plt.scatter(news_df['polarity'], news_df['sentiment'], alpha=0.4)

# Best-fit line (like geom_smooth(method='lm'))
x = news_df['polarity'].to_numpy()
y = news_df['sentiment'].to_numpy()
mask = np.isfinite(x) & np.isfinite(y)
m, b = np.polyfit(x[mask], y[mask], 1)
xline = np.linspace(x[mask].min(), x[mask].max(), 200)
plt.plot(xline, m * xline + b)

plt.title('TextBlob vs VADER Sentiment')
plt.xlabel('TextBlob')
plt.ylabel('VADER')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

topic_plot = topic_sentiment.copy()
topic_plot['topic_id'] = topic_plot['topic_id'].astype(str)

plt.figure()
plt.bar(topic_plot['topic_id'], topic_plot['sentiment'])
plt.title('Average Sentiment by Topic')
plt.xlabel('Topic ID')
plt.ylabel('Average VADER Sentiment')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
